narrative: US-Iran tensions over the weekend may weigh on EUR/USD at the Tokyo open, closed Friday at 1.1723; USD/JPY, closed Friday at 157.03, may also be pressured. AUD/USD, closed Friday at 0.7208, and USD/CAD, closed Friday at 1.3588, are likely to be influenced by crude oil price movements. The bull steepener yield curve regime sets up a risk-off environment for the next session.
